title: docs: add examples with resource limits and mounts
body:
This PR adds comprehensive examples to the `podman pod create` manpage to demonstrate the newer features where resource limits and volume mounts are shared with all containers in a pod.


```release-note
docs: add examples with resource limits and mounts 
```
fixes : #26371
